spec_match.rationale: Clearly compares traditional CSS Grid track sizing with the new Chrome 150 element-width capability natively to show syntax parity.

interactive.rationale: Has a live capability probe check button and interactive comparison toggle.

edge_cases.rationale: Contrasts the behavior across short, medium, and long content limits.

design_system.rationale: Excellent comparative column layout, clean usage matrix tables, and proper CSS color styling variables.

summary: A very solid side-by-side comparison highlighting parity between CSS Grid's mature track fit-content sizing and Chrome 150's new standalone element sizing properties.
